result:
Done. Milestone authored and decomposed.

## Summary

I read the spec (`README.md` — the five-level paradigm, layered-Kahn wave derivation, and the wave-boundary failure contract), then inspected the live codebase to ground the decomposition: the `pkg/dispatch.Subagent` interface and `ProviderSpec` (which already reserves the `"openai"` vendor sentinel), the `internal/subagent/anthropic/` layering I'm asked to mirror, `ResolveProvider` (confirmed it returns `Vendor:"anthropic"` unconditionally — the gap this run closes), the `SubagentConfig`/`LevelConfig` per-level overrides, the chart `images.*` + secret-ref conventions, and the `make verify-*` firewall guards.

### Deliverables written

**`MILESTONE.md`** (task dir root) — tight, declarative, spec-voiced: the single user-visible outcome (one Project, Claude planners + Codex executors, multi-phase run to completion with identical mixed-provider failure semantics), what actually ships (only the Codex package + per-level provider switch), exit criteria, and the locked decisions carried forward so phases don't reopen them.

**Four Phase child CRDs** in `children/` (machine contract):

| Phase | Boundary | dependsOn |
|-------|----------|-----------|
| `phase-01-provider-switch` | Controller per-level vendor resolution (no hardcoded `anthropic`), zero Codex imports | `[]` |
| `phase-02-codex-subagent` | `internal/subagent/codex/` implementing the Subagent interface end-to-end (run/stream/childCRD/usage/pricing), offline-testable | `[]` |
| `phase-03-image-and-credentials` | Codex `Dockerfile` + chart `images.codexSubagent` + Secret-name value | `[phase-02]` |
| `phase-04-mixed-provider-integration` | Example Project + integration test proving the heterogeneous run + failure semantics | `[phase-01, phase-03]` |

### Derived Execution DAG
- **W1:** `phase-01`, `phase-02` (parallel — they share only the `ProviderSpec` contract)
- **W2:** `phase-03` (tidal-locked on the buildable package)
- **W3:** `phase-04` (tidal-locked on both the switch and the image)

Each phase has a clear deliverable boundary, all `dependsOn` reference earlier siblings only, every `milestoneRef` wires to `milestone-01-codex-subagent`, and the graph is acyclic.
